awards.title: Society for Research in Child Development Governing Council Member-at-Large
awards.issuingBody: Society for Research in Child Development
awards.description: Elected to Governing Council as Member-at-Large, representing international perspectives and contributing to strategic direction of major child development research organization.
awards.responsibilities: Strategic governance, international representation, policy development

awards.title: Durham University International Research Collaboration Award
awards.description: Recognition for outstanding international research collaboration in cultural psychology.

awards.title: Human Relations Area Files Global Scholar
awards.description: Selected as HRAF Global Scholar for research on 'Traditional Luhya Mourning Rituals: A Cultural Evolutionary Approach to Understanding Community Wellbeing'. Recognition for contributions to cross-cultural research and indigenous knowledge systems.
awards.selectionCriteria: Competitive selection based on research excellence and cross-cultural impact
awards.researchFocus: Cultural evolutionary approaches to indigenous mourning practices
awards.institution: Human Relations Area Files, Yale University
awards.outcomes: Advancement of cross-cultural research methodology and indigenous knowledge documentation

awards.title: ICDSS Covid Global Scholar
awards.issuingBody: International Consortium of Developmental Science Societies
awards.description: Recognition for research on COVID-19 impacts on adolescent development across cultures.

awards.title: International Society for the Study of Behavioral Development Developing Country Fellowship
awards.issuingBody: International Society for the Study of Behavioral Development
awards.description: Three-year fellowship supporting research on behavioral development in developing countries.
